refnamediv.refpurpose: finds the frequency associated to a date

listitem.para: * indw = 'w' if the date is given as a day date but corresponds to a week (optional)
* fq = an integer (the frequency of the date)
* namefq = a string (the string characteristic of the date)

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Finds the frequency associated to a date.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
